hook.summary: High-stakes tennis rally on a neon galaxy court.
hook.visual_action: Two characters exchange fast shots in a competitive match setting with a cosmic-themed court floor.

scene_flow: Fast-paced tennis rally on a cosmic-themed court showing gameplay mechanics and UI.
A player scores a point with a powerful cross-court shot as the crowd cheers.
Cinematic transition to a high-quality 3D render of a male player performing a powerful serve.
Final end card featuring the game logo, developer logo, and a prominent 'PLAY' button.
audience_proxy: Competitive sports fans and casual gamers who enjoy high-energy, visually vibrant mobile sports simulations.
